title: Holographic Quantum Error Correction: AdS/CFT and Tensor Networks
description: Discover how the AdS/CFT correspondence reveals deep connections between quantum gravity and quantum error correction. Learn about holographic codes, tensor network models, and the emergence of spacetime from entanglement.
learningObjectives: Explain the AdS/CFT correspondence and the holographic principle
Understand how bulk operators are encoded in boundary degrees of freedom
Analyze the Ryu-Takayanagi formula for holographic entanglement entropy
Construct and analyze tensor network models of holography
Connect quantum error correction to gravitational physics
Explore the relationship between entanglement and spacetime geometry
